india_trends.title: JioStar's quarterly profit drops 53% as ad slowdown, content costs weigh
india_trends.summary: India's largest media company’s fourth-quarter revenue from operations rose 21.4% quarter-on-quarter to ₹8,372 crore, while its earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization fell to ₹827 crore from ₹1,303 crore in the three months through December 2025.

india_trends.title: Air India hesitant to shift part of operations to new greenfield facility at Navi Mumbai
india_trends.summary: Air India expresses reservations about relocating operations to Navi Mumbai International Airport. The airline cites higher charges and operational inefficiencies as key concerns. Current challenges in the aviation sector further complicate the move. Air India suggests strengthening incentive plans

india_trends.title: Reliance Retail posts record revenue as profit inches up 0.5% in March quarter
india_trends.summary: Reliance Retail reported steady earnings growth and its highest-ever quarterly revenue in Q4FY26, even as margins slipped and analysts flagged pressure on operating leverage amid rapid scale-up across stores, e-commerce and FMCG.

india_trends.title: IndusInd Bank appoints Sunil Kumar Singh as chief compliance officer
india_trends.summary: IndusInd Bank has appointed Sunil Kumar Singh as its new Chief Compliance Officer, effective April 30, 2026. Singh will succeed Sachin Patange, whose tenure concludes on April 29, 2026. The appointment, approved by the Board of Directors, will see Singh serve a three-year term as Senior Management P

india_trends.title: Reliance Jio IPO soon? Here's what Mukesh Ambani said on India's largest listing plans
india_trends.summary: Mukesh Ambani said Jio Platforms IPO plans are advancing, marking a key milestone. Strong growth, rising ARPU and subscriber gains support valuation, with the listing expected to unlock value and become one of India’s largest offerings.

india_trends.title: Reliance Retail growth steady as quick commerce drives expansion
india_trends.summary: Reliance Retail Ventures Ltd posted modest profit growth as heavy investments in quick commerce impacted margins, despite strong revenue gains. Rapid expansion in hyperlocal delivery, FMCG and store network supported scale, positioning the company for long-term growth and deeper market penetration.

india_trends.title: IndusInd Bank eyes FY27 growth reset after crisis-hit year as profit returns in March quarter
india_trends.summary: IndusInd Bank expects loan and deposit growth to align with the industry in FY27 after a year of stress in derivatives and microfinance, though war-related uncertainty keeps the near-term outlook cautious.

india_trends.title: Reliance Industries Q4 Results: Profit falls 13% YoY as energy margins weaken; Jio and retail shine
Pulse of the Street: Markets snap two-week winning streak, tumble on Iran, IT
india_trends.summary: A sharp selloff snapped the market’s two-week rally, with IT weakness and geopolitical tensions dragging indices lower this week. With crude high and the rupee weak, investors rotated into defensives even as foreign outflows stayed selective.

india_trends.title: Reliance profit dips 13% as war-hit O2C drags, retail and Jio steady
india_trends.summary: India’s most valuable company reported a consolidated profit of ₹16,971 crore, marginally above the consensus estimate of ₹16,944 crore of six analysts polled by Bloomberg. Consolidated revenue grew 13% year-on-year (y-o-y) to ₹2.99 trillion.

india_trends.title: Infra projects see cost overrun of Rs 5.61 lakh crore in March
india_trends.summary: As of March 2026, the landscape of central sector infrastructure is marked by significant challenges, with projects exceeding Rs 150 crore collectively suffering a cost overrun of Rs 5.61 lakh crore. The total revised budget for 1,941 ongoing projects has ballooned to Rs 41.50 lakh crore, against an

india_trends.title: Haryana policy change drives developer interest in senior living
india_trends.summary: Haryana's new retirement housing policy is boosting senior living projects. Developers can now build more units, making projects more viable. This change encourages integrated communities with essential amenities. Demand is rising due to longer life spans and changing family structures. Major develo

india_trends.title: Trade competitiveness will depend on how industry leverages facilitation measures: CII
india_trends.summary: Speaking at a webinar here , Chairman of CII Western region Subcommittee on International Trade & Investment and MD, Continental Carriers, Vaibhav Vohra, also said that the wider adoption of such initiatives can significantly improve efficiency and reduce transaction costs.

india_trends.title: Sebi proposes overhaul of broker capital rules, links net worth to clients and risk
india_trends.summary: The regulator has proposed tying variable net worth to active client base and credit balances, tightening capital buffers for stock brokers to better capture operational risk.

india_trends.title: Intel stock surges 24% as AI-driven CPU demand fuels turnaround
india_trends.summary: Intel’s shares surged over 24% after strong AI-driven demand for its CPUs led to better-than-expected results, even prompting sales of previously written-off chips. The rally lifted its market value past $416 billion and boosted peers like AMD and Arm, as optimism grows around CPUs regaining importa

india_trends.title: Crude shock, higher premiums hit Reliance O2C margins as Iran war disrupts supply chains
india_trends.summary: Reliance Industries' Oil-to-Chemicals segment faced margin pressures in the March quarter due to rising crude premiums, elevated freight, and insurance costs. india_trends.summary: The Justice Department has concluded its investigation into Federal Reserve chair Jerome Powell.
